rules: Alle som har gjort det som står på kortet må drikke.

en.title: Never Have I Ever
en.description: Draw a statement. If you have done it, drink.
rules: Draw one question at a time.
Read the statement out loud for everyone.
Everyone who has done what is on the card must drink.
